_note: SPATIAL PROOF: topological space, pure data. A building of 4 rooms wired into a corridor by `door` edges (generator chain). A courier starts in room 1 (spawned only there via count eq(index,0)), carries mail, and walks room->room through doors, dropping mail to WHOEVER is co-located (affect co:). Residents live one-per-room. Success: courier's parent changes over time (it relocates), and residents' mail rises only when the courier is in their room. Exercises: chain (route graph), move-through-parent-door, here_/co: co-location.
